name: Phantom of Chaos
name_jp: ファントム・オブ・カオス
desc: Your opponent takes no battle damage from attacks involving this card. Once per turn: You can target 1 Effect Monster in your GY; banish that target, and if you do, until the End Phase, this card's name and original ATK become that monster's name and original ATK, and replace this effect with that monster's original effects.
mnst_eff: Your opponent takes no battle damage from attacks involving this card. Once per turn: You can target 1 Effect Monster in your GY; banish that target, and if you do, until the End Phase, this card's name and original ATK become that monster's name and original ATK, and replace this effect with that monster's original effects.
eff: Your opponent takes no battle damage from attacks involving this card. sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
